data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Identify root cause of test-batched.sh exiting with code 144 during resume cycles
- [ ] Fix the time budget calculation or test timeout handling so individual tests don't exceed the tool timeout ceiling
- [ ] Verify: Run test-batched.sh --timeout=50 --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts and confirm no exit 144 over at least 200 test completions
- [ ] No regression in existing test-batched.sh tests (tests/scripts/test-test-batched.sh passes)
